heading: Wednesday Night
text: Clear to partly cloudy, with areas of freezing fog in the valleys.

heading: Thursday
text: Chance of afternoon rain west and south of I-89; chance of flurries far north.
temperature: Lower 30s to upper 40s, north to south

heading: Thursday Night
text: Wintry mix west and south of I-89, spreading north and east after midnight.

heading: Friday
text: Snow or a mix from I-89 north and east, and a mix or rain southwest.
